summary: Dutch energy meter tracking app where users can set a starting meter reading per year and enter monthly actual meter readings for gas and electricity. Currently fixing broken gas/electricity cost calculations and adding a usage analysis view (electricity high/low tariff and gas, split and totals).
known_issues: Gas and electricity cost calculations are broken and not computing correctly

existing_features.title: Fix gas and electricity cost calculations so that monthly costs are correctly computed from meter reading deltas multiplied by the applicable per-unit price (gas €/m³, electricity €/kWh) for the selected year. Ensure SummaryOverview KPI cards (gas costs, electricity costs, total energy costs, yearly prognosis) all display correct values.

Add a usage analysis view (new tab or section) that shows total energy consumption broken down by: electricity high tariff (kWh), electricity low tariff (kWh), electricity combined total (kWh), and gas (m³). Display both monthly breakdowns and yearly totals for each category.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix broken gas and electricity cost calculations
Add usage analysis view showing total electricity (high and low tariff) and gas usage, split and totals
